comment: Minimal ACL subcommand surface only.
Compatibility response surface only; full AOF rewrite lifecycle semantics are not implemented.
Compatibility response surface only; does not provide full Redis background-save lifecycle behavior.
Narrow subset implementation including minimal CLIENT LIST behavior for dependent tests.
Selected subcommands are implemented; unsupported subcommands are cluster-support-disabled.
Declared extension surface; runtime behavior is not implemented.
Compatibility digest surface is limited to DEBUG DIGEST-VALUE.
Behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; Lua 5.1 via mlua with KEYS/ARGV/redis.call/pcall bridge and cjson/cmsgpack/bit libraries and sandbox with readonly protection and shebang flags=no-writes support.
Behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; write commands rejected from script context; same sandbox as EVAL.
Behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; NOSCRIPT on missing SHA; cached script with shebang/no-writes support; replication normalizes mutating EVALSHA to EVAL.
Behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; same as EVALSHA with write-command rejection.
Behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; executes functions registered via FUNCTION LOAD with full sandbox and library support.
Behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED; read-only function execution with no-writes flag enforcement.
Supports HELP/LIST/DELETE/STATS/KILL/DUMP/RESTORE/FLUSH [ASYNC|SYNC] plus LOAD [REPLACE] with redis.register_function parsing and description metadata; behind GARNET_SCRIPTING_ENABLED.
Hash-field expiration subset implemented; full command-family parity is not complete.
